string.text:
VG-40OP is an illumination grenade with parachute. A slowly descending flare will review a wide area on the battlefield.
 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Blast power: %c[ui_gray_1]none
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Brightness: %c[ui_gray_1]normal
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Illumination duration: %c[ui_gray_1]60 seconds
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Fuse delay: %c[ui_gray_1]~3 seconds

The M662 parachute flare is designed to create a 213.36 centimeters-per-second descent, while the flare itself has a 40-seconds burn time.
 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Blast power: %c[ui_gray_1]none
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Brightness: %c[ui_gray_1]high
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Illumination duration: %c[ui_gray_1]40 seconds
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Fuse delay: %c[ui_gray_1]~3 seconds

A US Army smoke grenade used as a ground-to-ground or ground-to-air signaling device, a target or landing zone marking device, or a screening device for unit maneuvering.
 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Blast power: %c[ui_gray_1]none
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Smoke diameter: %c[ui_gray_1]8 m
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Smoke duration: %c[ui_gray_1]20 seconds
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Explosion delay: %c[ui_gray_1]~1 second

The RDG-2 is a cheap, simple, Soviet-era smoke grenade found in many Eastern European countries. The casing is made from cylindrical cardboard with two coloured caps on the end where the smoke is deployed from. The RDG-2 is used as a means to signal friendly forces or as a screening device.
 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Blast power: %c[ui_gray_1]none
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Smoke diameter: %c[ui_gray_1]8 m
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Smoke duration: %c[ui_gray_1]40 seconds
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Explosion delay: %c[ui_gray_1]~3.5 seconds

An improvised explosive trap kit made of tent pegs, wooden stakes, wire, and a hand grenade. Any human or mutant passing through the wire will trigger the attached grenade. The grenade has been modified to explode almost instantly, therefore it's no longer suitable for throwing.
 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Explosive: %c[ui_gray_1]F1 grenade
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Wire length: %c[ui_gray_1]2 m.
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Explosion delay: %c[ui_gray_1]~1 seconds
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Can be defused and recovered. Require Swiss knife or Multitool.

A demolition charge are used to destroy battlefield obstacles and equipment.
 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Blast power: %c[ui_gray_1]massive
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Blast radius: %c[ui_gray_1]10 m
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Explosion delay: %c[ui_gray_1]~5 seconds
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] No shrapnels.
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Cumbersome object. Reduce throwing distance.
